problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
